title: Khusro Bagh
tagline: Khusro Bagh — heritage city of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Khusro Bagh is a large walled garden and burial complex located in muhalla Khuldabad, close to the Prayagraj Junction railway station, in Prayagraj, India.
overview.description: Khusro Bagh is a large walled garden and burial complex located in muhalla Khuldabad, close to the Prayagraj Junction railway station, in Prayagraj, India. It is roughly 6 km from the Akbar fort (built-in r. 1556–1605). It is situated over forty acres and shaped like a quadrangle.

topPlaces.name: Khuldabad, Prayagraj
topPlaces.description: Khuldabad is a locality/township of Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: All Saints Cathedral, Prayagraj
topPlaces.description: All Saints' Cathedral, also known as Patthar Girja (Church of Stones), is a cathedral of the Church of North India located in Prayagraj, India. Modelled after 13th-century Gothic style churches, it is among the Gothic Revival buildings built by the British during their rule in India.

topPlaces.name: Chowk, Prayagraj
topPlaces.description: Chowk is a neighborhood in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is the historic city centre of Old Prayagraj.

topPlaces.name: Bharati Bhavan Library
topPlaces.description: Bharati Bhavan Library a Hindi and Urdu public library in Allahabad, India. The library was established in 1889 by the joint efforts of Pt.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya New Cantt
topPlaces.description: Kendriya Vidyalaya New Cantt, Prayagraj is a co-educational central government school located in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is administered by the Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan (KVS), an autonomous body under the Ministry of Education of the Government of India.

topPlaces.name: Civil Lines, Prayagraj
topPlaces.description: Civil Lines (formerly Cannington also Canning Town) is a Civil Lines neighborhood of Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is the upper-class central business district of the city and is famous for its urban setting, gridiron plan roads high rise buildings, offices, cafes, restaurants, hotels, malls, shopping complexes, theatres etc.

topPlaces.name: South Malaka
topPlaces.description: South Malaka is a locality/township of Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is close to the railway track connecting Prayagraj to Varanasi and Gorakhpur.

topPlaces.name: Shahi Masjid, Prayagraj
topPlaces.description: The Shahi Masjid ( Persian: مسجد شاهی), (Urdu: شاہ مسجد) is a Mughal mosque, located in the Bahadurganj area of Allahabad in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. It was established in 1643 CE, by the Mughal prince Mirza Dara Shikoh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Khusro Bagh?
faq.a: The best time to visit Khusro Bagh is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Khusro Bagh?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Prayagraj Airport (Bamrauli) (9 km) and the nearest railway station is Prayagraj Junction (1 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Khusro Bagh?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Khusro Bagh at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Khusro Bagh?
faq.a: Stays in Khusro Bagh start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Khusro Bagh?
faq.a: The top attractions are Khuldabad, Prayagraj, All Saints Cathedral, Prayagraj, Chowk, Prayagraj, Bharati Bhavan Library, Kendriya Vidyalaya New Cantt.
